metaDescription: A smart digital menu for your restaurant. Serve menus instantly to tables via QR codes. Multi-language and multi-currency support.

hero.subtitle: Manage products, categories and prices with ease. Serve menus to tables instantly via QR code.

features.title: Everything in one place
features.subtitle: All the tools you need to run your restaurant.

items.title: Easy Management
items.desc: Add, edit or hide products, categories and prices instantly. Drag-and-drop ordering supported.

items.title: Multi-Language
items.desc: Reach international customers in Turkish, English, Spanish, Russian, German, French and Italian.

items.title: QR Code
items.desc: Generate a unique QR code for each table. Customers reach the menu instantly with their phone camera.

items.title: Multi-Currency
items.desc: Define prices in TRY, USD, EUR and more. Menu updates automatically based on the chosen currency.

items.title: Nutrition Facts
items.desc: Add calorie, protein, carb and allergen info to products. Ideal for health-conscious customers.

items.title: Multi-Restaurant
items.desc: Manage multiple branches from a single account. Custom menu and settings per branch.

cta.title: Get started now
cta.subtitle: Explore the system with the demo account or set it up for your own restaurant right away.
